remaining_spec_items: Sprint 3: User Guide — Workflow Steps 5-8 (model-execution, stress-testing, overlays, sign-off)

Sprint 8: Homepage, Navigation & Polish (homepage redesign, navbar/footer, cross-reference audit, final build)
last_action: Sprint 3 iter 1 build complete: All 4 pages ≥150 lines (157, 179, 168, 177). npm run build 0 errors. Fresh deploy to docs_site/. Ready for Visual QA and evaluation.
